subcodes.first_line: The world hath been illumined by the splendors of the countenance of the Ancient King, yet most men remain in manifest remoteness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد استضاء العالم من انوار وجه مالک القدم و الناس اکثرهم فی بعد مبین قد تحرک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
